# EcomWave

> AI-powered SEO tools for Shopify stores. Generate optimized product descriptions, meta tags, and titles in seconds.

## Tools
- [Product Description Generator](https://ecomwave.app/shopify-product-description-generator/) — AI-generated SEO product descriptions
- [Meta Tags Optimizer](https://ecomwave.app/shopify-meta-tags-optimizer/) — Title tags and meta descriptions
- [Bulk SEO](https://ecomwave.app/bulk-product-seo-shopify/) — Optimize entire catalog at once
- [Title Generator](https://ecomwave.app/shopify-product-title-generator/) — Keyword-rich product titles

## Blog
- [Shopify SEO Blog](https://ecomwave.app/blog/) — Guides and tactics for Shopify merchants

## Pricing
- Free: 5 products/month
- Pro: $29/month, unlimited, 14-day free trial
